# Menerick's Security Ledger

> Cybersecurity research, detection engineering, and agentic defense frameworks
> by John Menerick (W8MEJ), Security Engineer in Castro Valley, CA.
> Focused on zero trust architecture, trusted AI compute, and bio-inspired SOC design.

## Core Content

- [About John Menerick](https://www.securesql.info/about/): Security engineer biography, credentials (CISSP, GCP), 11+ years in information security.
- [Research Projects](https://www.securesql.info/research/): Active research including threat intelligence metrics, vulnerability analytics, and ML-driven pentesting.
- [Blog](https://www.securesql.info/blog/): 116+ posts on cloud security, Kubernetes, incident response, cryptography, and AI/ML security from 2011–present.

## Agentic SOC Framework (Season 2 Series)

- [From Biology to Bot](https://www.securesql.info/2026/01/31/season2-zeronoisecollective/): Agency Ladder (Levels 0–5), TAME framework, TOTE loops.
- [Ashby's Ultimatum](https://www.securesql.info/2026/02/04/season2episode3/): Law of Requisite Variety applied to cybersecurity defense.
- [Blueprint for a Living Defense](https://www.securesql.info/2026/02/11/season2episode9_conclusion/): Full 8-episode synthesis matrix, TAME summary, CBO governance model.

## Whitepapers

- [From Biology to Bot — CTO Whitepaper](https://www.securesql.info/images/CTOWhitepaper.pdf): Executive framework for agentic SOC transition.
- [Agentic Defense & Biological Security for AI](https://www.securesql.info/images/Agentic_Defense_Biological_Security_for_AI.pdf): Research paper on biological frameworks applied to AI defense.

## GitHub Projects

- [Hacker EZines](https://github.com/w8mej/Hacker_EZines): Curated hacker magazine collection (66 stars).
- [IR Knowledge](https://github.com/w8mej/IRKnowledge): Incident response tool list (34 stars).
- [ThreatPlays](https://github.com/w8mej/ThreatPlays): Threat hunting runbooks (25 stars).

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.securesql.info/sitemap.xml): Full index of 159 URLs, 2011–2026.
